home.title: Hi! My name is Jan Paul
home.p1: I am a software engineer with way too much energy, who creates and develops experiences that make people's lives simple and awesome. I am an aspiring Hugo Boss model and (try to be) a Club DJ.
home.p2: I live in the beautiful Jordaan, a neighborhood in Amsterdam bustling with culture and history, where every street corner tells its own story. My passion for travel has led me to faraway places, but I always love returning to the coziness of my own city. In addition to my adventures around the world, I love making the stand unsafe on my fixed gear. The feeling of freedom as I zigzag through the narrow streets, the wind in my hair, is incomparable.
